## ERT1.1. Horizontal en route flight efficiency of the actual trajectory (KEA) (KPI#1)

With respect to 2024, Romania has seen an improvement of KEA (3.70% in 2025 vs 3.77% in 2024) and a very slight improvement in the KEA corrected for the effect of the war in Ukraine (1.76% in 2025 vs 1.77% in 2024). In 2025 those values rank Romania as 20^th^ in terms of KEA and 11^th^ in terms of corrected KEA.

The contribution to the overall additional distance in the SES area is the 5^th^ highest in 2025, with a value of 5.33%.
